ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the app belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the app */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the app in MB */,
  "installs" INTEGER /* Total number of installs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content rating of the app */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the app was last updated */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the app */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the app */,
  "min_os_version" TEXT /* Minimum operating system version required */,
  "target_os_version" TEXT /* Target operating system version */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the app is free */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL for downloading the app */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's icon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the app */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the latest update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_content_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating_id") REFERENCES content_ratings ("content_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* The content rating of the app */,
  "age_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended age range for the content rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_genres" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, beta tester, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the user uses */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the user's device */,
  "device_os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user leaving the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "is_helpful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is marked as helpful */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "flagged_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the developer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the developer registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the developer's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the developer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)
